welcome.title: Welcome, Parents!
welcome.description1: DialBuddy teaches children ages 3-4 how to dial phone numbers through fun, guided practice.
welcome.description2: Your child will learn to call you, grandparents, and eventually emergency services when needed.
welcome.feature1: 100% Offline - No internet, no data collection
welcome.feature2: Parent-Controlled - Add contacts behind parent gate
welcome.feature3: Adaptive Learning - Difficulty adjusts to your child
welcome.feature4: No Actual Calls - Safe practice environment
welcome.privacyText: All data stays on this device. We never collect, share, or sell your family's information.

country.title: Where are you located?
country.subtitle: This helps us teach the correct emergency number for your country.

language.title: Choose Your Language
language.subtitle: Select the language for the app interface and voice prompts.

emergency.title: Confirm Emergency Number
emergency.subtitle: This is the emergency number we'll teach your child to dial.
emergency.warningText: DialBuddy does NOT make real calls. Your child will practice dialing in a safe simulation environment. When they're ready for a real emergency, they'll know exactly what to dial.
emergency.confirmText: I confirm this is the correct emergency number for my location

screenTime.cardBody: DialBuddy defaults to 15-minute daily sessions — the optimal learning window for toddlers ages 3-4.
screenTime.source1: WHO (2019): No more than 1 hour of screen time per day for ages 3-4
screenTime.source2: AAP (2016): Limit screen time to 1 hour/day for ages 2-5
screenTime.source3: Research: 10-15 min focused sessions maximize learning for preschoolers
screenTime.changeTip: You can change or remove this limit anytime in the Parent Zone.

settings.title: Initial Settings
settings.subtitle: Choose how your child experiences DialBuddy. You can change these anytime in the Parent Zone.
settings.soundDescription: Play realistic phone dial tones (DTMF sounds) when buttons are pressed
settings.voiceDescription: Spoken encouragement and hints ('Great job!', 'Try the 5')
settings.hapticDescription: Gentle vibrations when buttons are tapped (helps with motor skill learning)
settings.tipText: We recommend keeping sound ON for the best learning experience. Children learn faster with multi-sensory feedback (visual + audio + touch).

home.greeting: Hi! What do you want to do?

practice.title: Let's Practice!
practice.completed: You did it! {{name}} is so proud of you!
practice.celebrationMessage: Amazing! You dialed the whole number!

freeDial.title: Free Dial
freeDial.subtitle: Tap numbers and explore!
freeDial.wrongNumber: Oops! That's not a number I know!
freeDial.tryAgain: Try dialing someone from My People!

contacts.title: My Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Who do you want to call?
contacts.empty: No contacts yet! Ask a grown-up to add some.
contacts.permissionMessage: DialBuddy needs access to your contacts so you can add people for your child to practice calling.
contacts.permissionDenied: Contact permission was denied. You can enable it in Settings.

emergency.title: Emergency Number
emergency.subtitle: Learn when and how to call for help

hub.title: Practice Emergencies
hub.subtitle: Learn what to do in an emergency
hub.dialDesc: Learn to dial the emergency number
hub.safetyNote: DialBuddy does NOT make real calls. This is a safe practice environment.

when.title: When to Call for Help
when.instruction: Which of these is an emergency?
when.momFell: Mom fell and can't get up

emergency.intro: {{number}} is a VERY special number. It sends helpers like police, firefighters, and doctors to come help you.
emergency.onlyForBig: But we only use it when something really big and really scary is happening.
emergency.letsLearn: Let's learn when to call and when NOT to call!

scenarios.title: When Should You Call {{number}}?
scenarios.swipeInstructions: Swipe right for YES, left for NO
scenarios.incorrect: Let's think about this one again.
scenarios.listSubtitle: Pick a situation to practice with a grown-up
scenarios.scenariosDesc: Walk through emergency situations step by step

fire.title: There's a Fire!
fire.scene: You see smoke and flames coming from the kitchen. The house is on fire!
fire.action: You need to call {{number}} right now!
fire.script: Help! There is a fire at my house! My name is {{name}}. I live at {{address}}. Please come fast!

unconscious.title: Someone Won't Wake Up
unconscious.scene: Mommy fell down and won't wake up. She is not moving or talking!
unconscious.action: Call {{number}} — she needs a helper right now!
unconscious.script: Help! My mom fell down and she won't wake up! My name is {{name}}. I live at {{address}}. Please hurry!

poison.title: Someone Drank Something Dangerous
poison.scene: Your little brother drank something from under the sink. It could hurt him!
poison.action: Call {{number}} right away — this is an emergency!
poison.script: Help! Someone drank something dangerous! My name is {{name}}. I live at {{address}}. Please come fast!

injury.title: Someone Is Badly Hurt!
injury.scene: You fell and cut yourself very badly. There is a lot of blood!
injury.script: Help! Someone is hurt and bleeding a lot! My name is {{name}}. I live at {{address}}. Please send help!

intruder.title: A Stranger Is Inside!
intruder.scene: You hear strange noises. A stranger came into your house and you don't know them!
intruder.action: Stay quiet and call {{number}} right now!
intruder.script: Help! There is a stranger inside my house! My name is {{name}}. I live at {{address}}. Please come fast!

scenario.readAloud: Read this out loud to the helper:
scenario.tryAgain: Try again! Say the key words.
scenario.speechError: Microphone had a problem. Try again.
scenario.micPermissionDenied: Microphone permission not granted. Tap below to continue.
scenario.successMessage: You knew exactly what to do in an emergency!
scenario.successSteps:
✅ You called for help
✅ You told them what happened
✅ You are so brave!

silentCall.title: What If You Can't Talk?
silentCall.intro: Sometimes you might need to call {{number}} but you can't talk because you need to be very quiet.
silentCall.itsOk: That's OK! Just call, and DON'T hang up.
silentCall.helpersKnow: The helpers can sometimes figure out where you are just from your call.
silentCall.stayOnLine: Even if you can't say anything, staying on the phone is helping.
silentCall.secretAgent: You're like a secret agent - very quiet and very brave!
silentCall.neverHangUp: NEVER hang up. Even if you can't talk.

afterCall.title: What to Do Next
afterCall.stayOnPhone: Stay on the phone! Don't hang up.

quiz.title: Quick Question!
quiz.tryAgain: Let's practice that one again soon.

badge.description: You know when to call for help and what to say!

simonSays.title: Simon Says
simonSays.levelComplete: Amazing! Let's try a longer one!

gate.instructions: To access parent settings, place two fingers on the screen below and hold for 3 seconds.
gate.coppaNote: This gate prevents children from accessing adult settings. Required for COPPA compliance.
gate.instruction: Press and hold both circles for 3 seconds

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.description: Sound effects, voice prompts, vibration, and more
appSettings.soundEffectsDesc: Play DTMF tones when dialing (realistic phone button sounds)
appSettings.vibrationDesc: Haptic feedback when pressing dialer buttons
appSettings.voiceRecognitionDesc: Allow children to speak phone numbers instead of dialing (advanced feature)
appSettings.autoDifficultyDesc: Automatically increase difficulty level as child improves
appSettings.changesTakeEffect: Changes take effect immediately. Settings are saved automatically.
appSettings.sessionLengthDesc: Prompt a break after this many minutes of practice.

learningPreferences.title: Learning Preferences
learningPreferences.description: Difficulty level and learning assistance options
learningPreferences.chooseGuidance: Choose how much guidance your child receives during practice sessions.
learningPreferences.easyDesc: Full guidance: All digits highlighted, visual hints shown. Best for beginners.
learningPreferences.mediumDesc: Partial guidance: Only current digit highlighted. For children who know the basics.
learningPreferences.hardDesc: Minimal guidance: No highlights, child recalls independently. For confident dialers.
learningPreferences.autoTip: Tip: Enable "Auto-Adjust Difficulty" in App Settings to automatically increase difficulty as your child improves.

regionalSettings.title: Regional Settings
regionalSettings.countryDesc: Choose your country to set the correct phone number format and emergency number.
regionalSettings.emergencyDesc: This is the emergency number your child will practice dialing for your selected country.
regionalSettings.languageDesc: Choose the language for voice prompts and app interface.
regionalSettings.autoUpdate: Note: Changing your country will automatically update the phone number format for all saved contacts.

navigation.myContactsDesc: Add, edit, or remove phone numbers
navigation.childProfilesDesc: Manage profiles and switch active child
navigation.emergencyInfoDesc: Home address and fire meeting spot
navigation.progressReportsDesc: View learning progress and mastery levels

footer.compliance: COPPA Compliant • No Data Collection • 100% Offline

validation.invalidNumber: This doesn't look like a valid phone number

emergencyInfo.title: Emergency Info
emergencyInfo.whyThisMatters: This information helps your child know what to say when calling for help. In Phase 2, it will be used in our dispatcher practice simulation.
emergencyInfo.streetAddressHint: The street address of your home (required)
emergencyInfo.fireMeetingSpotHint: Where your family meets outside if there's a fire
emergencyInfo.fireMeetingSpotPlaceholder: Big oak tree in front yard
emergencyInfo.otherInfoHint: Allergies, medical conditions, or second parent contact
emergencyInfo.privacyNote: 🔒 Stored only on this device. Never shared or uploaded.

progressReport.title: Progress Report
progressReport.noProgressSub: Start practicing to see progress here

selectScreen.title: Practice Calling
selectScreen.emptyMessage: Ask a parent to add contacts in the Parent Zone!
selectScreen.instructionTitle: Who do you want to call?
selectScreen.instructionSubtitle: Tap a person to practice their number!

transition.message3: You learned it! Now show me! 💪

instructions.finalRound: 🎯 Final Round - Dial the whole number!

dialedDisplay.chunkPrompt: Tap the highlighted number to start!

ringing.answerMessage: Hi! Great job dialing my number! You did it!
